positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a cosmic mountain range under a nebula sky. The mountains are formed from giant, crystallized celestial objects—some resemble stained glass, others glow with bioluminescent internal light. A small, stylized rocket ship, trailing ethereal stardust, journeys through the peaks. The scene uses strong, deep indigo blues, vibrant cyan neons, and pops of magenta and gold for contrast. Minimalist linework with high saturation and strong silhouette definition, designed for apparel printing. Clean lines, epic sense of depth, and symmetry.
